# trajectories

A single agent run after Bento has assembled and analyzed it (the monitoring unit), vs a raw run/trace, the recorded run before analysis. Read-only; carries suspicious/win flags, error and finding counts. Dashboard: Monitoring.

**When to use:** Scanning analyzed runs for trouble ("show me suspicious / errored / winning runs"), reading one run's spans, or pulling the findings off a specific run. Triage of tracked problems goes to issues.

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `get` | `bentolabs trajectories get <trajectory_id>` | one run with full step-by-step spans, flags, and counts |
| `list` | `bentolabs trajectories list [--limit --cursor --start-time --end-time --status --is-suspicious ...]` | analyzed runs, priority-ordered; filter suspicious/win/has-errors/has-findings/status (defaults to summarized only) |
| `list-findings` | `bentolabs trajectories list-findings <trajectory_id>` | the observations extracted from that one run (vs list = the runs themselves) |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs trajectories <command> --help`.
